mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the trend is measured continuously.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available RSAFS snapshot value was 352985
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests, with Rank IC below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deterioration in labor income, credit quality, and profit expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after the labor weakness threshold is crossed.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 6-month moving average by more than 0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:latest available UNRATE snapshot value was 10.0
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the federal funds rate from a low base raises discount rates and tightens financial conditions, reducing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 12-month moving average after being below it for at least 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest available FEDFUNDS snapshot value was 0.12
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day SPX returns following triggered FEDFUNDS up-crossings are not lower than unconditional 60-day returns, or if the sign is positive in more than 60% of triggers.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll gains paired with a non-rising policy rate indicate improving income growth without immediate discount-rate pressure, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and FEDFUNDS 3-month change is less than or equal to 0
evidence_refs: fact:latest available PAYEMS snapshot value was 130910
regime_hint: early expansion with accommodative monetary policy
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and FEDFUNDS-flat signal does not outperform PAYEMS-positive observations alone by at least 25 basis points over 20 trading days in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals stronger real activity and operating leverage for cyclically exposed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets update growth expectations.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available INDPRO snapshot value was 100.3043
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum is followed by lower 5-day SPX returns than negative INDPRO momentum in two consecutive 3-year rolling validation windows.

mechanism_narrative: A strong rebound in housing starts signals improving construction demand, household confidence, and durable-goods spillovers, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its 12-month moving average and rises more than 10% over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest available HOUST snapshot value was 574.0
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST rebounds do not generate average 60-day SPX returns above the unconditional average, or if the excess mean return is negative after transaction-cost assumptions.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI while the federal funds rate remains flat signals falling real policy restraint and future tightening risk, pressuring valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses above its 12-month growth rate while FEDFUNDS 3-month change is less than 0.1 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:latest available CPIAUCSL snapshot value was 217.541
regime_hint: inflation acceleration with delayed policy response
failure_condition: Reject if this joint inflation-policy trigger has nonnegative average 20-day SPX returns or if CPI acceleration alone explains the returns with no incremental interaction effect.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP expansion confirmed by rising retail sales signals broad demand recovery and stronger aggregate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarter-over-quarter change is positive and RSAFS 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest available GDPC1 snapshot value was 12973.0
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous positive GDPC1 and RSAFS growth does not improve 60-day SPX return hit rate above 55% or fails to outperform either single-series signal alone.
